info.description: The reason tiles shown in the "Why Choose Us" section on the home page

title.description: The short headline for this reason, e.g. "Certified Technicians"

description.description: One or two sentences explaining this reason in more detail

tag.description: Short badge text under the description, e.g. "TRUSTED SOURCING"

icon.description: Key into the frontend's Icon.tsx registry

iconColor.description: Icon badge color for this reason tile
